# data(forTag:)

**Type Method**

Encodes a specified tag using BER-TLV tag encoding rules.

## Declaration

```swift
class func data(forTag tag: TKTLVTag) -> Data
```

## Parameters

- **tag**: The tag value to encode.

## Return Value

A data object that encodes a tag value using BER-TLV encoding.
